text:
Once upon a moonlit night, in a forgotten village shrouded in mist, nestled an old oak tree. Inside that sturdy oakcriptor lived Digitaria. She was kind-hearted. People said she knew secrets.

One quiet afternoon, a young fox named Leo swooped down. Leo had heard tales. He heard Digitaria cared lots. Why talk secrets?

Digitaria listened. An owl's wisdom fell. An owl's eyes shimmered.

"The fox knows numbers." the owl whispered.

Leo grinned.

"You do? That's my game."

They tossed bones.

Days turned into nights. Leo loved.

One moonlit sea.

"The owl knows stars."

Nocturnal.

Stars guided.

They'd skip stones.

Stars whispered.

Leo learned.

Their forest grew.

That's how friendship blossomed.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
